mapper.sql: t.id, t.name, t.job_group, t.job_id, t.alarm_event, t.channel_ids, t.enabled, t.remark, t.update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xxl_job_alarm_rule ( name, job_group, job_id, alarm_event, channel_ids, enabled, remark, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{jobGroup}, #{jobId}, #{alarmEvent}, #{channelIds}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE xxl_job_alarm_rule SET name = #{name}, job_group = #{jobGroup}, job_id = #{jobId}, alarm_event = #{alarmEvent}, channel_ids = #{channelIds}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM xxl_job_alarm_rule t WHERE t.enabled = 1 AND t.job_group = #{jobGroup} AND t.alarm_event = #{alarmEvent} AND (t.job_id IS NULL OR t.job_id = 0 OR t.job_id = #{jobId}) ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.job_id = #{jobId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.id DESC
